arts.ttl: The 3 positions Real Madrid want to strengthen this summer, and 3 players who could be signed
arts.sum: An insight into the plans of the brass at La Liga giants Real Madrid for the summer transfer window has on Tuesday been provided. The info comes courtesy of Diario…

arts.ttl: Official: Real Madrid name squad to face Getafe
arts.sum: The squad of players called upon by Real Madrid for the club’s upcoming meeting with Getafe has on Tuesday been unveiled online. Real Madrid are of course primed to return…

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti reveals Kylian Mbappe injury return date for Real Madrid
arts.sum: Kylian Mbappe faces a race against time to feature for Real Madrid in Saturday's Copa del Rey final.

arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold is the 'perfect player' for Real Madrid, insists Brazil legend with Liverpool star expected to join Spanish giants this summer
arts.sum: Trent Alexander-Arnold has been tipped to be a huge hit at Real Madrid - by the greatest right back of all time. The Liverpool star is widely expected to join the Spanish giants in the summer.

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti confirms double Real Madrid injury boost for Barcelona clash
arts.sum: Real Madrid head coach Carlo Ancelotti has on Tuesday confirmed a pair of timely personnel boosts in his squad. This comes amid confirmation that both Kylian Mbappé and Ferland Mendy…

arts.ttl: Bordalás: “It’s Never a Good Time to Face Real Madrid”
arts.sum: Ahead of Getafe’s daunting matchup against Real Madrid tomorrow, José Bordalás, in the pre-game press conference, faced the media acknowledging the challenge his team is up against. “I always say it’s never a good time to face Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid boss Carlo Ancelotti addresses exit talk just days before Barcelona Copa del Rey final
arts.sum: Real Madrid manager Carlo Ancelotti breaks his silence over speculation regarding his future amid talk that he could soon leave the Bernabeu.

arts.ttl: Ancelotti hits back at criticism: ‘It’s not my way, hire another coach’
arts.sum: Carlo Ancelotti doesn’t he agree he should be tougher with his players? He wouldn’t be...

arts.ttl: 'Stress is fuel' - Ancelotti plays down Real pressure
arts.sum: Carlo Ancelotti says he welcomes the pressure that comes with managing Real Madrid and is unconcerned about speculation over his future.

arts.ttl: Will Kylian Mbappe play against Barcelona? Injury latest on Real Madrid star before Copa del Rey final
arts.sum: Mbappe will remain absent when Los Blancos meet Getafe in final game before Clasico showdown with Barca in Seville
